title: Start-up visa designated organizations:  Get the designation - Canada.ca
content:
We aren’t currently designating new organizations. We may designate new ones in the future.

## Once you’re designated
Once your organization has been designated, you will be given access to a free dedicated service channel (DSC) and an account manager who can
- answer your organization’s questions
- give your organization guidance
The DSC doesn’t process applications and can’t assist you in the application process.
